**Chelsea have made a swift decision in sacking their head coach, Liam Rosenior, after only three months at the helm of the Premier League club.**
## Context / Background
Liam Rosenior was appointed as the head coach of Chelsea with a contract until 2032. However, his tenure has been cut short due to unforeseen circumstances.
## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Category | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Tenure | Three months |
| Contract | Until 2032 |
| Reason | Unforeseen circumstances |
> The decision to sack Liam Rosenior has come as a shock to many, given his short tenure at the club.
## What's Next?
Chelsea will now be on the lookout for a new head coach to take over the reins. The club's schedule remains unchanged, with upcoming matches in the Premier League.
